channel.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Jun 18th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Bluetooth

  • ublestars65 - Lightweight Bluetooth Low Energy driver written in pure python for micropython.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Cryptography

  • ucryptostars4 - Micropython package for doing fast elliptic curve cryptography, specifically digital signatures. API design inspired from fastecdsa and implementation based on tomsfastmath.
  • ucryptoauthlibstars28 - Lightweight driver for Microchip Crypto Authentication secure elements written in pure python for micropython.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 30th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Potentiometers

  • micropython-ad840xstars0 - Micropython SPI-based manipulation of the AD series digital potentiometers AD8400, AD8402 and AD8403.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 28th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

E-Paper

  • micropython-ili9341stars0 - SSD1606 active matrix epaper display 128x180.

    • Libraries

    LCD TFT

  • micropython-ili9341stars0 - Collection of drivers for TFT displays, ILI9341, SH1106, SSD1606, ST7735.
  • SSD1963-TFT-Library-for-PyBoard-and-RP2040stars15 - SSD1963 TFT Library for PyBoard and Raspberry Pi PICO.

    • Libraries

    OLED

  • micropython-oledstars0 - Collection of drivers for monochrome OLED displays, PCD8544, SH1106, SSD1306, UC1701X.

    • Libraries

    ADC

  • micropython-ads1015stars0 - ADS1015 12-Bit and ADS1115 16-bit ADC, 4 channels with programmable gain, I2C interface.

    • Libraries

    Servo

  • micropython-pca9685stars0 - 16-channel 12-bit PWM/servo driver.

    • Libraries

    Distance IR

  • micropython-gp2y0e03stars0 - IR-LED distance measuring sensor using Sharp GP2Y0E03.
  • micropython-vl6180stars0 - Time-of-Flight sensor, ambient light sensor & IR emitter.

    • Libraries

    Distance Laser

  • micropython-vl53l0xstars0 - Time-of-Flight laser-ranging sensor.

    • Libraries

    Temperature Analog

  • micropython-max31855stars0 - Thermocouple amplifier, SPI interface.

    • Libraries

    Temperature Digital

  • micropython-si7021stars0 - SI7021 Temperature and humidity sensor, I2C interface.

    • Libraries

    Rotary Encoder

  • encodermenustars45 - Simple GUI menu for micropython using a rotary encoder and basic display.

    • Books

  • MicroPython For Everyone: How To Use ESP32 And ESP8266: Micropython Mqtt - By Mason Milette. ISBN 9798748248822.
  • MicroPython for Microcontrollers - By Günter Spanner. ISBN 9783895764370.
  • Get Started with MicroPython on Raspberry Pi Pico - By Gareth Halfacree and Ben Everard. ISBN 9781912047864.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 27th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Pressure

  • ms5803-micropythonstars0 - A micropython implimentation of the driver for an MS5803 pressure & temperature sensor.

    • Libraries

    DAC

  • mcp4728stars1 - Helper library for the Microchip MCP4728 I2C 12-bit Quad DAC.

    • Libraries

    IO-Expander

  • micropython-74hc595stars3 - MicroPython driver for 74HC595 8-bit shift registers.

    • Libraries

    LED Segment

  • TM74HC595stars2 - Driver for shift register controlled 5 pin display modules.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 14th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

ADC

  • MicroPython-ADC_Calstars0 - ESP32 ADC driver using reference voltage calibration value from efuse.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 4th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Soil Moisture

  • MicroPython-MiFlorastars1 - Xiaomi Mi Flora (aka. flower care) BLE plant sensors (soil moisture/conductivity/light intensity/temperature).

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Apr 21st, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Stepper

  • ticlibstars1 - Driver for Pololu Tic stepper motor controllers.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Jan 5th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

MDNS

  • micropython-mdnsstars4 - A pure python implementation of MDNS with support for Service Discovery.

    • Libraries

    Onkyo EISCP

  • eiscp-micropythonstars1 - Micropython port for the Onkyo-EISCP protocol used, among others, by Pioneer.

    • Development

    On Host

  • mpsyncstars2 - A small tool that synchronizes a folder to a MicroPython board whenever it detects a change.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Nov 14th, 2020
item.description:
Development

IDEs

  • JetBrains IntelliJ/PyCharm MicroPython Plugin - Plugin for MicroPython devices in IntelliJ and PyCharm.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Sep 16th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Temperature Digital

  • micropython-lm75astars0 - Driver for the NXP LM75A digital temperature sensor.
  • micropython-sht11stars1 - Driver for Sensirion SHT11 temperature and humidity sensor.
  • micropython-tmp1075stars0 - Driver for the TI TMP1075 temperature sensor.

    • Community

  • Discord - Get an invite to the MicroPython Discord server.

    • Libraries

    Camera

  • micropython-camera-driverstars89 - OV2640 camera driver for MicroPython on ESP32.

    • Libraries

    LoRaWAN

  • DeLoReANstars2 - DeLoReAN is a (De)dicated (Lo)RaWAN node (Re)cording (A)ny (N)FC tags.

    • Libraries

    Web

  • micropython-utelegramstars10 - Telegram API wrapper for MicroPython.

    • Development

    Code Generation

  • micropy-stubsstars15 - Automatically Generated Stub Packages for Micropy-Cli and whomever else.

    • Libraries

    GUI

  • micropython-lcd160cr-guistars22 - Simple touch driven event based GUI for the Pyboard and LCD160CR colour display.
  • micropython_ra8875stars5 - MicroPython device driver and nano-GUI for RA8875 based displays.
  • micropython-nano-guistars112 - Nano-Gui provides a limited set of GUI objects (widgets) for displays whose display driver is subclassed from the framebuf class. Which includes LCD and OLED displays.
  • lvglstars93 - An object oriented component based high-level GUI library with MicroPython binding.

    • Frameworks

  • terkin-dataloggerstars30 - Flexible data logger application for MicroPython and CPython.
  • micrOSstars14 - MicroPython based IoT Framework.

    • Libraries

    Cryptography

  • micropython-aesstars11 - AES algorithm with pure python implementation.
  • mpyaesstars5 - MicroPython module for AES encryption.

    • Libraries

    E-Paper

  • ssd1675astars5 - Driver for SSD1675 based E-Paper displays.

    • Libraries

    RTC

  • micropython-mcp7940stars0 - Driver for the Microchip MCP7940 RTC.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Jul 8th, 2020
item.description:
Books

  • MicroPython Projects - By Jacob Beningo. ISBN 9781789958034.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Jun 20th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Light

  • bh1750 - BH1750 i2c digital light sensor driver.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Jun 1st, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Distance Laser

  • Qwiic_TOF_Module_RFD77402stars1 - Qwiic TOF Module (RFD77402) time-of-flight rangefinding module.

    • Libraries

  • GitLab Explore - Explore repositories on GitLab.
  • PyPi - This filter shows just the MicroPython libraries on PyPi. Note: You cannot pip install micropython libraries. See MicroPython docs for more information on upip.
  • GitHub Search - Search GitHub for repositories containing MicroPython.
  • GitHub Topic - MicroPython - Browse GitHub Topics for projects tagged with MicroPython.
  • Libraries.io - Libraries.io query for MicroPython.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 29th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

GPIO

  • micropython-debounce-switchstars5 - MicroPython Class for Debouncing Switches.

    • Development

    Debugging

  • esp32-backtracestars7 - ESP32 Exception Stack Backtrace Analyzer.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 26th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

MQTT

  • MQBoardstars59 - A micro-framework for using MQTT with asyncio on MicroPython boards, primarily on the ESP32.
  • sonoff-mqtt by daveastars53 - MicroPython scripts to control Sonoff/ESP8266 using MQTT.
  • micropython-thingspeak-mqtt-esp8266stars24 - Publish and Subscribe to Thingspeak using MQTT with MicroPython running on ESP8266/ESP32 platforms.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Development

Code Generation

  • micropython-stubberstars62 - Generate and use stubs for different MicroPython firmwares to use with vscode and/or pylint.
  • micropy-clistars125 - Micropy Cli is a project management/generation tool for writing MicroPython code in modern IDEs such as VSCode.

    • Libraries

    Web

  • microdotstars124 - The impossibly small web framework for MicroPython.
  • uwebsocketsstars101 - MicroPython websockets implementation for ESP8266.

    • Libraries

    LEDs

  • tlc5947-rgb-micropython - Driver for the TLC5947 24 channel 12-bit PWM LED driver.
  • micropython-ws2801stars1 - A MicroPython library to interface with strands of WS2801 RGB LEDs.

    • Libraries

    Database

  • nmongostars15 - MongoDB client for CPython and MicroPython, with mongo shell like APIs.

    • Libraries

    Serial

  • micropython-modbus - MicroPython port of modbus-tk.

    • Libraries

    REPL

  • jupyter_micropython_remote - Jupyter kernel to directly execute code on a MicroPython board over the serial/web REPL.
  • zepl - MicroPython WebREPL Console Application using ZeroMQ.
  • webrepl - MicroPython WebREPL.

    • Libraries

    IoT

  • micropython-home-assistant - MicroPython based scripts to extend you home assistant driven home automation projects.

    • Libraries

    DNS

  • MicroDNSSrvstars34 - A micro DNS server for MicroPython to simply respond to A queries on multi-domains with or without wildcards (used on Pycom modules & ESP32).

    • Libraries

    Analytics

  • micropython-vec - Vector Operations on MicroPython.
  • micropython-mtx - Fast Matrix Multiplication and Linear Solver on MicroPython.
  • micropython-ulabstars178 - A numpy-like fast vector module for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    CAN

  • micropython-spacecan - Spacecan is a MicroPython implementation of the SpaceCAN protocol for embedded systems.

    • Libraries

    Scheduling

  • micropython-mcronstars8 - MicroCRON is a time-based task scheduling program for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    LED Segment

  • micropython-tm1640 - MicroPython Library for 16 digits 7-segment displays controlled by a TM1640.

    • Libraries

    Stepper

  • micropython-multiaxis - Multiaxis with MicroPython ESP32 and DRV8825.

    • Libraries

    GPIO

  • ubutton - A MicroPython library for controlling reading and debouncing pushbutton inputs, including "short" and "long" press callbacks.

    • Libraries

    IO-Expander

  • micropython-pcf8591 - MicroPython driver for PCF8591 8-Bit I2C I/O Expander.

    • Libraries

    Rotary Encoder

  • uencoder - A MicroPython library for reading from a rotary encoder.

    • Libraries

    PWM

  • upwmcontroller - A MicroPython library for controlling PWM outputs in an asyncio loop, with features including fading and blinking.

    • Libraries

    Motion Inertial

  • micropython-fusion - Sensor fusion calculates heading, pitch and roll from the outputs of motion tracking devices.

    • Libraries

    Gaseous

  • micropython-scd30stars9 - MicroPython I2C driver for Sensirion SCD30 CO2 sensor module.

    • Development

    On Host

  • mpfshellstars342 - A simple shell based file explorer for ESP8266 and WiPy.
  • ampystars510 - Adafruit MicroPython Tool - Utility to interact with a MicroPython board over a serial connection.
  • rshellstars557 - Copy or Sync files to Boards, enter REPL from your terminal.

    • Development

    On Device

  • Micropython-Editorstars123 - Small on-board editor for PyBoard, WiPy, ESP8266, ESP32, PyCom and Adafruit devices written in Python.
  • upy-shellstars32 - A simple command line based shell for MicroPython.

    • Development

    IDEs

  • Micropython IDE for VSCode - MicroPython IDE for VSCode README.
  • Micropython-REPLink for VSCode - Handy shortcuts for interacting with a MicroPython REPL terminal.

    • Libraries

    NTP

  • micropython-ntpclientstars2 - NTP client for MicroPython using uasyncio.

    • Libraries

    Radio

  • micropython-rfsocketstars29 - MicroPython implementation of popular 433MHzn based RFSockets.

    • Libraries

    LCD TFT

  • st7789py_mpystars29 - Slow MicroPython driver for 240x240 ST7789 display without CS pin from Ali Express, written in MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    ADC

  • micropython-hx711stars38 - MicroPython driver for HX711 24-Bit Analog-to-Digital Converter.

    • Libraries

    Air Quality

  • micropython-pms7003stars19 - MicroPython driver for the PMS7003 Air Quality Sensor.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 17th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Database

  • micropgstars9 - PostgreSQL database driver for MicroPython.
  • picoredisstars3 - A very minimal Redis client (not only) for MicroPython.
  • micropython-redisstars17 - A redis client implementation designed for use with MicroPython.
  • uPyMySQLstars14 - Pure uPython MySQL Client.

    • Libraries

    GPS

  • mpy-agpsstars6 - MicroPython implementation of assisted location services (AGPS).

    • Community

  • Slack - Get an automated invite to the micropython.slack.com workspace.
  • Melbourne MicroPython Meetup - Regular meetup at CCHS in Melbourne, Australia.
  • MicroPython on Facebook - Like MicroPython on Facebook for competitions, news and updates.
  • MicroPython Forum - Online community of over 6400 users discussing all things related to MicroPython.

    • Books

  • Advanced Programming in MicroPython By Example - By Yury Magda. ISBN 9781090900937.
  • Python for Microcontrollers: Getting Started with MicroPython - By Donald Norris. ISBN 9781259644535.
  • MicroPython Cookbook - By Marwan Alsabbagh. ISBN 9781838649951.
  • Programming with MicroPython: Embedded Programming with Microcontrollers and Python - By Nicholas H. Tollervey. ISBN 9781491972731.
  • MicroPython for the Internet of Things: A Beginner's Guide to Programming with Python on Microcontrollers - By Charles Bell. ISBN 9781484231227.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 16th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

NTP

  • esp8266_ntp_webserverstars1 - MicroPython + esp8266 + ntp + webserver.
  • micropython_ntpserverstars1 - An NTP server written for MicroPython.
  • micropython-ntpdstars1 - An implementation of an ntpd in MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Stepper

  • uln2003stars31 - Driver for 5V 28BYJ-48 stepper motors.

    • Libraries

    EEPROM

  • micropython_eepromstars22 - MicroPython device drivers for nonvolatile memory chips (EEPROM, FRAM, Flash).

    • Resources

  • MicroPython on Wikipedia - MicroPython on Wikipedia.

    • Development

    IDEs

  • Thonny IDE - Thonny: Python IDE for beginners.

    • Libraries

    LCD TFT

  • micropython-ili9341stars13 - ILI9341 TFT driver for MicroPython on ESP32.
  • micropython-ili9341stars50 - MicroPython Driver for ILI9341 display.
  • st7789_mpystars83 - Fast pure-C driver for MicroPython that can handle display modules on ST7789 chip.
  • micropython-ili9341stars15 - MicroPython ILI9341 display & XPT2046 touch screen driver.

    • Libraries

    Web

  • micropython-nogginstars14 - A very simple web server for MicroPython.
  • MicroRESTClistars21 - A micro JSON REST Web client based on MicroWebCli for MicroPython (used on Pycom modules & ESP32).
  • micropyserverstars31 - MicroPyServer is a simple HTTP server for MicroPython projects.
  • microCoAPystars31 - A mini client/server implementation of CoAP (Constrained Application Protocol) into MicroPython.
  • ESP8266WebServerstars32 - ESP8266 web server for MicroPython.
  • uPyPortalstars29 - A captive portal for MicroPython using ESP32 (WeMos).
  • micropython-captive-portalstars41 - A captive portal demo for MicroPython.
  • upy-websocket-serverstars54 - MicroPython (ESP8266) websocket server implementation.
  • tinywebstars96 - Simple and lightweight HTTP async server for MicroPython.
  • MicroWebSrv2stars322 - The last Micro Web Server for IoTs (MicroPython) or large servers (CPython), that supports WebSockets, routes, template engine and with really optimized architecture (mem allocations, async I/Os).
  • MicroWebSrvstars430 - A micro HTTP Web server that supports WebSockets, html/python language templating and routing handlers, for MicroPython (used on Pycom modules & ESP32).

    • Libraries

    MQTT

  • uMQTTstars8 - MQTT publish for MicroPython on the WiPy board.
  • micropython-sonoff-switchstars8 - Implements a MQTT controllable switch for the iTead Sonoff Switch using MicroPython.
  • umqtt_aws_iotstars13 - Publish UMQTT messages with MicroPython to AWS IoT.
  • pysmartnodestars65 - MicroPython Smarthome framework.
  • micropython-mqttstars230 - A 'resilient' asynchronous MQTT driver. Plus a means of using an ESP8266 to bring MQTT to non-networked targets.

    • Libraries

    Analytics

  • ulinalgstars25 - Small size matrix handling module with a few linear algebra operations specifically for MicroPython (Python3).
  • micropython-fourierstars50 - Fast Fourier transform in MicroPython's inline ARM assembler.
  • uMathstars8 - Computer Algebra for microcontrollers.

    • Libraries

    Radio

  • micropython-ys-rf34tstars3 - MicroPython examples using YS-RF34T 433MHz ASK/OOK UART transceivers.
  • micropython_remotestars8 - Capture and replay 433MHz remote control codes. Control remote switched power adaptors.

    • Libraries

    Zigbee

  • ZbPystars30 - MicroPython IEEE802.15.4 / Zigbee parser.

    • Libraries

    IoT

  • SonosRemotestars33 - A remote for Sonos installations running on an ESP8266 and using Sonos HTTP API.
  • uPyEchostars37 - Emulated Belkin WeMo device that works with Amazon Echo (Alexa) using MicroPython on an ESP32.
  • microhomiestars63 - MicroPython implementation of the Homie MQTT convention for IoT.

    • Libraries

    FTP

  • MicroFTPServerstars30 - Minimal FTP Server that can run on an ESP8266 with MicroPython.
  • FTP-Server-for-ESP8266-ESP32-and-PYBDstars90 - Small FTP server for ESP8266/ESP32/PYBD on the MicroPython platform.
  • micropython-ftplibstars13 - An FTP client library for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    LCD Character

  • micropython-lcdstars16 - Class for controlling the HD44780 from a MicroPython pyboard.

    • Libraries

    LCD Graphic

  • micropython-hx1230stars5 - MicroPython library for HX1230 96x68 LCD modules.

    • Libraries

    Motion Inertial

  • micropython-mpu6886stars9 - MicroPython I2C driver for MPU6886 6-axis motion tracking device.

    • Libraries

    Camera

  • Nikon-Trigger-for-MicroPythonstars0 - Remote trigger for a Nikon camera using an IR LED. For PyBoard v1.1.

    • Libraries

    Barometer

  • micropython-bmp280stars27 - Module for the BMP280 sensor.
  • BME280stars52 - MicroPython driver for the BME280 sensor, target platform Pycom devices.

    • Libraries

    LEDs

  • ws2812-SPIstars15 - An efficient micropython WS2812 (NeoPixel) driver.

    • Libraries

    LED Matrix

  • micropython-max7219stars19 - MicroPython driver for MAX7219 8x8 LED matrix.

    • Libraries

    ADC

  • micropython-ads1219stars2 - MicroPython module for the Texas Instruments ADS1219 ADC.
  • ADS7818stars0 - Python class interfacing the ADS7818 AD-converter.

    • Libraries

    IO-Expander

  • micropython-pcf8575stars2 - MicroPython driver for PCF8575 16-Bit I2C I/O Expander with Interrupt.
  • micropython-pcf8574stars9 - MicroPython driver for PCF8574 8-Bit I2C I/O Expander with Interrupt.
  • micropython-mcp23017stars18 - MicroPython driver for MCP23017 16-bit I/O Expander.

    • Libraries

    GPIO

  • micropython-inputsstars18 - Classes to count pulses, debounce digital inputs, and calculate moving averages of analog inputs for a MicroPython board.

    • Libraries

    Rotary Encoder

  • micropython-rotarystars76 - MicroPython module to read a rotary encoder.

    • Libraries

    Air Quality

  • pollystars11 - SDS011 pollution sensor + Wemos D1 mini pro + MicroPython.
  • micropython-pms5003-minimalstars0 - Driver for pms5003 air quality sensor for MicroPython.
  • pms5003_micropythonstars15 - Driver for pms5003 air quality sensor for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Compass

  • QMC5883stars3 - Python class for the QMC5883 Three-Axis Digital Compass IC.

    • Libraries

    Energy

  • MCP39F521stars5 - ESP8266 scripts for reading MCP39F521 power monitors.

    • Libraries

    Gaseous

  • CCS811stars21 - Basic MicroPython driver for CCS811 on ESP8266 boards.

    • Libraries

    Touch Resistive

  • XPT2046-touch-pad-driverstars10 - Driver for XPT2046 touch pad controller used in many TFT modules.

    • Libraries

    FRAM

  • micropython-framstars0 - Pyboard driver for Ferroelectric RAM module.

    • Libraries

    E-Paper

  • micropython-waveshare-epdstars34 - Waveshare E-Paper Display driver for devices running Pycom-flavored MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    WiFi

  • micropython-wifimanagerstars38 - A simple network configuration utility for MicroPython on the ESP8266 board.

    • Libraries

    Telnet

  • MicroTelnetServerstars51 - Simple telnet server for MicroPython and the ESP8266 allowing telnet clients access to the REPL.

    • Libraries

    Serial

  • mpy-minitermstars12 - Tool for seamless serial debug and file synchronisation with MicroPython devices via the serial REPL.

    • Libraries

    SMTP

  • uMailstars24 - A lightweight, scalable SMTP client for sending email in MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    IR

  • esp8266_irstars45 - Control IR signal by websocket.
  • micropython-ys-irtmstars11 - MicroPython examples for YS-IRTM 5V NEC Infrared UART transceivers.
  • micropython-amg88xxstars11 - Driver for Grid-EYE thermal infra red array sensor (Adafruit 3538).
  • micropython_irstars31 - Nonblocking device drivers to receive from IR remotes and for IR "blaster" apps.

    • Libraries

    LoRaWAN

  • uPyLoRaWANstars125 - ESP32 using MicroPython meets LoRa and LoRaWAN.

    • Libraries

    GSM

  • micropython-upyphonestars398 - A gsm phone using pyboard and sim800l.

    • Libraries

    DNS

  • ICantBelieveItsNotDNSstars17 - "I Can't Believe It's Not DNS!" (ICBIND) is an authoritative DNS server for the ESP8266 written in MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Audio

  • micropython-midistars21 - A midi implementation example for MicroPython.
  • upy-rtttlstars16 - Python Parser for Ring Tone Text Transfer Language (RTTTL).
  • micropython-vs1053stars12 - Asynchronous driver for VS1053b MP3 player.

    • Libraries

    AI

  • MicroMLPstars96 - A micro neural network multilayer perceptron for MicroPython (used on ESP32 and Pycom modules).

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 15th, 2020
item.description:
Development

IDEs

  • Mu Editor - Code with Mu: a simple Python\MicroPythonb\CircuitPython editor for beginner programmers.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Dec 21st, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Motion Inertial

  • micropython-mpu9250stars76 - I2C driver for MPU9250 9-axis motion tracking device.
  • micropython-mpu9x50stars153 - Driver for the InvenSense MPU9250 inertial measurement unit.
  • micropython-lsm9ds0stars3 - LSM9DS0 g-force linear acceleration, gauss magnetic and dps angular rate sensors.
  • MPU6050-ESP8266-MicroPythonstars43 - ESP8266 driver for MPU6050 accelerometer/gyroscope.
  • py-mpu6050stars68 - ESP8266 driver for MPU6050 accelerometer/gyroscope.
  • micropython-bmx055stars4 - Driver for Bosch BMX055 IMU sensor.
  • micropython-bno055stars3 - Bosch Sensortec BNO055 9DOF IMU sensor, I2C interface.

    • Libraries

    LED Matrix

  • micropython-ht1632cstars4 - Driver for HT1632C 32x16 bicolor led matrix.
  • micropython-wemos-led-matrixstars1 - Driver for Wemos D1 Mini Matrix LED shield, using TM1640 chip.
  • micropython-wemos-led-matrix-shieldstars6 - Driver for Wemos D1 Mini Matrix LED shield, using TM1640 chip.
  • micropython-matrix8x8stars13 - Driver for AdaFruit 8x8 LED Matrix display with HT16K33 backpack.

    • Libraries

    Energy

  • ATM90E26_Micropythonstars2 - Driver for ATM90E26 energy metering device.

    • Libraries

    Accelerometer Digital

  • micropython-lis2hh12stars8 - I2C driver for LIS2HH12 3-axis accelerometer.
  • adxl345_micropythonstars3 - Driver for ADXL345 16g 3-axis accelerometer.
  • MMA7660 - Driver for MMA7660 1.5g 3-axis accelerometer.

    • Libraries

    LCD TFT

  • micropython-ili934xstars6 - SPI driver for ILI934X series based TFT / LCD displays.

    • Libraries

    GPS

  • micropython-gnssl76lstars2 - MicroPython I2C driver for Quectel GNSS L76-L (GPS).

    • Libraries

    Temperature Digital

  • sht25-micropythonstars2 - Driver for SHT25 temperature and humidity sensor.
  • micropython-Si7005stars1 - Driver for Si7005 relative humidity and temperature sensor.
  • micropython-sht30stars28 - Driver for SHT30 temperature and humidity sensor.
  • LM75-MicroPythonstars2 - Driver for LM75 digital temperature sensor, I2C interface.
  • micropython-si7021stars8 - SI7021 Temperature and humidity sensor, I2C interface.
  • bme680-mqtt-micropythonstars11 - Driver for BME680 gas, pressure, temperature and humidity sensor.
  • micropython-am2320stars18 - Aosong AM2320 temperature and humidity sensor, I2C interface.
  • micropython-dht12stars15 - Aosong DHT12 temperature and humidity sensor, I2C interface.
  • micropython-hdc1008stars4 - Driver for the Texas Instruments HDC1008 humidity and temperature sensor.
  • micropython-mcp9808stars4 - Driver for the Microchip MCP9808 temperature sensor.
  • micropython-mpl115a2stars2 - Pyboard driver for the MPL115A2 barometric pressure sensor.
  • micropython-sht31stars13 - Driver for the SHT31 temperature and humidity sensor.
  • micropython-Si705xstars1 - Silicon Labs Si705x series of temperature sensors, I2C interface.
  • micropython-Si70xxstars2 - Silicon Labs Si70xx series of relative humidity and temperature sensors, I2C interface.
  • micropython-tmp102stars7 - Driver for TMP102 digital temperature sensor.
  • Official DHT11+DHT12 - ESP8266 driver for DHT11 and DHT12 temperature and humidity sensor.

    • Libraries

    Barometer

  • micropython-bmp180stars57 - Driver for Bosch BMP180 temperature, pressure and altitude sensor.
  • micropython-bme280stars0 - Driver for the Bosch BME280 temperature/pressure/humidity sensor.
  • mpy_bme280_esp8266stars68 - Bosch BME280 temperature/pressure/humidity sensor.

    • Libraries

    Audio

  • micropython-longwavestars3 - WAV player for MicroPython board.
  • micropython-dfplayerstars24 - Driver for DFPlayer Mini using UART.
  • KT403A-MP3stars6 - Driver for KT403A, used by DFPlayer Mini and Grove MP3 v2.0.
  • micropython-buzzerstars7 - Play nokia compose and mid files on buzzers.

    • Libraries

    Soil Moisture

  • micropython-chirpstars0 - Driver for the Chirp Soil Moisture Sensor.

    • Libraries

    Light

  • MicroPython-SI1145stars4 - SI1145 UV index, IR, visible light and proximity sensor.
  • mpy_bh1750fvi_esp8266stars10 - ESP8266 driver for BH1750FVI sensor.
  • micropython-tsl2561stars3 - Driver for the TSL2561 illumination sensor from TAOS / ams.

    • Libraries

    Gaseous

  • MQ135stars27 - Driver for MQ135 gas sensor.
  • micropython-MQstars8 - Drivers for MQ series gas sensors.

    • Libraries

    ADC

  • ads1x15stars50 - Driver for the ADS1015/ADS1115 ADC, I2C interface.
  • Micropython_ADS1115stars2 - ADS1115 16-bit ADC, 4 channels with programmable gain, I2C interface.

    • Libraries

    Air Quality

  • CCS811stars0 - CCS811 Air Quality Sensor.
  • upython-aq-monitorstars26 - Air Quality monitor using PMS5003 sensor and WiPy.

    • Libraries

    LEDs

  • micropython-morsecodestars3 - Blink an LED with morse coded message.
  • micropython-ws2812stars136 - Driver for WS2812 RGB LEDs.
  • micropython-ws2812-7segstars0 - 7-segment display using WS2812 RGB LEDs.

    • Libraries

    Camera

  • micropython-ov2640stars67 - MicroPython class for OV2640 camera.

    • Libraries

    Waveform Generator

  • Micropython-AD9833stars6 - Pyboard driver for AD9833, spi interface.

    • Libraries

    IO-Expander

  • micropython-mcp230xxstars28 - Driver for MCP23017 and MCP23008 GPIO expanders.
  • MCP23017-ESP8266-Miniature-Driverstars10 - Driver for MCP23017 16-bit I/O Expander.

    • Libraries

    LCD Character

  • pyboard-LCD-character-displaystars1 - PyBoard driver for HDD44780 compatible 1602 LCDs.
  • lcdi2cstars0 - Driver for HD44780 compatible dot matrix LCDs.
  • micropython-charlcdstars8 - Driver for HD44780 compatible LCDs.

    • Libraries

    OLED

  • SH1106stars58 - Driver for the SH1106 OLED display.

    • Libraries

    LED Segment

  • max7219_8digitstars6 - Driver for MAX7219 8-digit 7-segment LED modules.
  • micropython-max7219stars3 - Driver for MAX7219 8-digit 7-segment LED modules.
  • LKM1638stars1 - Driver for JY-LKM1638 displays based on TM1638 controller.
  • micropython-tm1640stars11 - Driver for TM1740 8x8 LED matrix modules.
  • micropython-tm1638stars11 - Driver for TM1638 dual quad 7-segment LED modules with switches.
  • micropython-my9221stars2 - Driver for MY9221 10-segment LED bar graph modules.

    • Libraries

    LCD Graphic

  • micropython-st7565stars6 - Driver for ST7565 128x64 LCDs.
  • micropython-lcd-AQM1248Astars0 - ESP8266 driver for AQM1248A graphic LCD.

    • Libraries

    E-Paper

  • micropython-waveshare-epaperstars143 - Drivers for various Waveshare e-paper modules.
  • micropython-epaperstars48 - Pyboard driver for Embedded Artists 2.7 inch e-paper display.

    • Libraries

    RFID

  • micropython-wiegandstars16 - Wiegand protocol reader.

    • Libraries

    Bluetooth

  • PyBoard-HC05-Androidstars9 - Pyboard HC05 Bluetooth adaptor example application.

    • Libraries

    IR

  • Micropython-IRstars8 - Pyboard infrared remote sniff and replay.

    • Libraries

    WiFi

  • HueBridgestars9 - Philips Hue Bridge.

    • Libraries

    RTC

  • Micropython_TinyRTCstars2 - Driver for DS1307 RTC.
  • micropython-tinyrtc-i2cstars27 - Driver for DS1307 RTC and AT24C32N EEPROM.

    • Libraries

    Stepper

  • micropython-upybbotstars56 - A4988 driver for bipolar stepper motors.

    • Libraries

    DC Motor

  • L298N - Driver for the L298N dual h-bridge motor controller.

    • Libraries

    Joystick

  • micropython-nunchuckstars6 - Driver for Nunchuk game controller, I2C interface.

    • Libraries

    DAC

  • micropython-mcp4725stars4 - Driver for the MCP4725 I2C DAC.

    • Libraries

    Touch Capacitive

  • micropython-mpr121stars7 - Driver for MPR121 capacitive touch keypads and breakout boards.
  • micropython-ttp223stars4 - Examples using TTP223 capacitive touch module.

    • Libraries

    Temperature IR

  • micropython-mlx90614stars16 - Driver for Melexis MLX90614 IR temperature sensor.

    • Libraries

    Temperature Analog

  • max31856stars1 - Precision thermocouple to digital converter with linearization, SPI interface.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Dec 20th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Current

  • micropythonINA219stars2 - Driver for INA219 current sensor.
  • pyb_ina219stars26 - Driver for INA219 current sensor.

    • Libraries

    Compass

  • micropython-esp8266-hmc5883lstars2 - 3-axis digital compass on the ESP8266.

    • Libraries

    Accelerometer Digital

  • ADXL345-with-Pyboardstars0 - Driver for ADXL345 16g 3-axis accelerometer.

    • Libraries

    OLED

  • Grove_OLED - Driver for SSD1327 used by SeeedStudio's Grove OLED Display 1.12" v1.0.
  • micropython-ssd1327stars15 - Driver for SSD1327 128x128 4-bit greyscale OLED displays.
  • micropython-ssd1351stars34 - Driver for SSD1351 OLED displays.
  • MicroPython_SSD1306stars6 - ESP8266 driver for SSD1306 OLED 128x64 displays.
  • Official SSD1306 - Driver for SSD1306 128x64 OLED displays.

    • Libraries

    LEDs

  • micropython-p9813stars2 - Driver for P9813 RGB LED used in SeeedStudio's Grove Chainable RGB LED.
  • Official APA102 - ESP8266 APA102/DotStar RGB LED driver.
  • Official WS2811 - ESP8266 WS2811/NeoPixel RGB LED driver.
  • tlc5940-micropythonstars4 - Driver for TLC5940 16 channel LED driver.

    • Libraries

    LCD TFT

  • MicroPython-ST7735stars57 - ESP32 version of GuyCarvers's ST7735 TFT LCD driver.
  • micropython-st7735stars20 - Driver for ST7735 TFT LCDs.
  • MicroPython_ST7735stars11 - Driver for ST7735 128x128 TFT.
  • ST7735 - Driver for ST7735 TFT LCDs.

    • Libraries

    LCD Graphic

  • micropython-pcd8544stars37 - Driver for Nokia 5110 PCD8544 84x48 LCD modules.
  • micropython-st7920stars5 - Library for simple graphic primitives on ST7920 128x64 monochrome LCD panel using ESP8266 and SPI.
  • MicroPython_PCD8544stars2 - ESP8266 driver for Nokia 5110 PCD8544.
  • Official LCD160CR - Driver for official MicroPython LCD160CR display with resistive touch sensor.

    • Libraries

    LCD Character

  • Grove_RGB_LCD - Driver for SeeedStudio's Grove RGB LCD.
  • micropython-i2c-lcdstars18 - Driver for I2C 2x16 LCD Screens.
  • python_lcdstars173 - Driver for HD44780 compatible dot matrix LCDs.

    • Libraries

    Ethernet

  • Official wiznet5k - Official driver for the WIZnet5x00 series of Ethernet controllers.

    • Libraries

    OneWire

  • Official OneWire - For devices using the OneWire bus, eg Dallas ds18x20.

    • Libraries

    Radio

  • Official nRF24L01 - Official driver for nRF24L01 2.4Ghz radio modules.
  • micropython-radiostars30 - Protocols for nRF24L01 2.4Ghz radio modules.

    • Libraries

    RFID

  • micropython-mfrc522stars95 - Driver for NXP MFRC522 RFID reader/writer.

    • Libraries

    IR

  • micropython-necirstars12 - NEC infrared capture for TL1838 IR receiver LEDs.

    • Libraries

    GPS

  • micropyGPSstars209 - Full featured GPS NMEA sentence parser.

    • Libraries

    Audio

  • JQ6500stars14 - Driver for JQ6500 UART MP3 modules.

    • Libraries

    LED Matrix

  • micropython-max7219stars85 - Driver for MAX7219 8x8 LED matrix modules.

    • Libraries

    LED Segment

  • micropython-tm1637stars71 - Driver for TM1637 quad 7-segment LED modules.

    • Libraries

    Distance Ultrasonic

  • micropython-hcsr04stars80 - Driver for HC-SR04 ultrasonic distance sensors.

    • Community

  • MicroPython on Twitter - Follow MicroPython on Twitter for latest news and updates.

    • Resources

  • MicroPython - Project website. Test drive the pyboard. Try MicroPython online with unicorn.
  • MicroPython on GitHubstars12.5k - Submit bug reports, follow and join in development on GitHub.
  • MicroPython Official Documentation - For various ports, including quick reference, general information, examples and tutorials.
  • MicroPython Wiki - Community generated documentation and examples of the features of MicroPython and the pyboard.
  • MicroPython Newsletter - Subscribe to the MicroPython newsletter for news and announcements including new features and new products.
  • MicroPython Store - Where you can buy the pyboard, housings, skins, books, connectors and peripherals.

    • Miscellaneous

  • MicroPython Kickstarter - 1,931 backers pledged £97,803 to help bring this project to life.
  • MicroPython on the ESP8266 Kickstarter - 1,399 backers pledged £28,534 to help bring this project to life.
